risk_flags.text: Without the tenancy agreement, the applicable statutory regime (e.g., Private Housing (Tenancies) (Scotland) Act 2016, Housing (Scotland) Act 1988) cannot be confirmed, risking incorrect legal analysis.
Absence of arrears correspondence may indicate missing evidence of demand, notice, or communication history, which could affect any possession or debt claim.
